{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/186935591?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xlally/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xlally/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xlally/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xlally/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/0xlally", "id": 186935591, "login": "0xlally", "node_id": "U_kgDOCyRpJw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xlally/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xlally/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xlally/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xlally/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xlally/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/0xlally", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45727", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:H/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}], "description": "The `cloakserve` CDP multiplexer uses the user-supplied `fingerprint` query parameter directly as a filesystem path component when creating Chrome profile directories. An unauthenticated attacker who can reach the cloakserve port can supply a crafted `fingerprint` value containing path traversal sequences to resolve `user_data_dir` outside the configured `data_dir`. When Chrome fails to start or the process is cleaned up, `shutil.rmtree()` deletes the traversed path, resulting in arbitrary directory deletion.

Additionally, `cloakserve` bound to `0.0.0.0` by default, making it network-exposed.

### Impact

An attacker with network access to the cloakserve port can delete arbitrary directories accessible to the service user.

### Patches

Fixed in v0.3.28.

### Mitigations

- Upgrade to v0.3.28 or later
- Restrict network access to the cloakserve port", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00475, "percentile": 0.37509}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-mf33-gv72-w2h5", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-18T17:50:21Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mf33-gv72-w2h5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-mf33-gv72-w2h5"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45727"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-01T19:16:53Z", "published_at": "2026-05-18T17:50:21Z", "references": ["https://github.com/CloakHQ/CloakBrowser/security/advisories/GHSA-mf33-gv72-w2h5", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45727", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mf33-gv72-w2h5"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/CloakHQ/CloakBrowser/security-advisories/GHSA-mf33-gv72-w2h5", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/CloakHQ/CloakBrowser", "summary": "CloakBrowser: Unauthenticated path traversal via fingerprint parameter in cloakserve leads to arbitrary directory deletion", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-09T10:50:58Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-mf33-gv72-w2h5", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.3.28", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "cloakbrowser"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.3.27"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: CloakBrowser: Unauthenticated path traversal via fingerprint parameter in cloakserve leads to arbitrary directory deletion
